# Capabilities & trust model

The machine-readable registry every command is classified against — read vs. write, where writes land, whether they are destructive, and what they require. Emit it live with `zotio capabilities` or over MCP as `zotero://capabilities`.

| Command | Operation | Write target | Destructive | Requires |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `analytics` | read |  |  |  |
| `annotations export` | read |  |  |  |
| `annotations search` | read |  |  |  |
| `annotations timeline` | read |  |  |  |
| `attachments add` | write | `web_api` |  | `web_api_key` |
| `auth logout` | other |  |  |  |
| `auth set-token` | other |  |  |  |
| `auth status` | other |  |  |  |
| `collections bundle` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections create` | write | `web_api` |  | `web_api_key` |
| `collections delete` | write | `web_api` | yes | `web_api_key` |
| `collections export` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections gaps` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections get` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections items` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections list` | read |  |  |  |

| `collections tags` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections top` | read |  |  |  |
| `collections update` | write | `web_api` |  | `web_api_key` |

| `creators audit fix` | write | `web_api` |  | `synced_store` |

| `doctor` | introspect |  |  |  |

| `groups list` | read |  |  |  |
